summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TradingView-like Overview page refactor with lightweight-charts v5. Overview page loads successfully with functional chart, asset/horizon switchers, and prediction overlays. API performance issues causing verdict loading delays but core functionality working.

performance_issues.symptoms: Verdict block shows 'Loading verdict...' indefinitely on frontend
performance_issues.impact: Poor user experience - users see loading state for extended periods

websocket_issues.symptoms: Console shows continuous WebSocket connection errors
websocket_issues.impact: Non-critical - app still functions but console spam

integration_issues.issue: Verdict block stuck in loading state due to backend API slowness

passed_tests: TradingView-like chart renders with lightweight-charts v5
SPX shows OHLC candles + prediction overlay (black line) - HOLD 51%
Asset switcher works: SPX/Bitcoin/Dollar buttons clickable
History toggle button present and clickable
Fractal pages still accessible: /fractal/spx (BULLISH SPX), /fractal/dxy (BEARISH USD), /fractal/btc (BULLISH BTC)
Backend APIs functional: /api/market/candles returns OHLC data
Backend APIs functional: /api/prediction/snapshots returns prediction data
Chart component renders correctly with data integration
action_item_for_main_agent: Optimize /api/ui/overview endpoint performance - currently taking 12+ seconds to respond causing poor UX. Consider implementing loading states, caching, or API optimizations. WebSocket connection issues should also be investigated but are lower priority.
